summary:
Claim: Streptococcus viridans is the most common causative agent of bacterial endocarditis.  
Evidence: - Accounts for approximately half of all native valve infective endocarditis cases globally. - Commonly present in oral flora and readily colonizes damaged heart valves through adherence mechanisms.  
Answer: C
